name: HRT_HONOR_ITEMS_V_
description:
This table contains profile items that make up a Profile. The items can be of any Content Type (Competencies, Objectives, etc.)

It contains all the Developer Descriptive Flex (DDFF) attributes where all the developer defined flex related information is stored and also contains all the Descriptive Flex (DFF) attributes where all the customer defined flex related information is stored.

columns.Name: HONOR_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PARENT_PROFILE_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Profile Item Id

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_PROFILES_B

columns.Name: SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_PROFILE_TYP_SECTIONS

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Syndication source profile ID. Use this property to display the source profile of a syndicated item

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source Type. For example, IRC, OTA

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY1
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY2
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY3
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date From

columns.Name: REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: A generic mandatory check box

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE
columns.Comments: Relative importance. This field is used in Search and Compare Profiles

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 240 characters

columns.Name: GRANTOR
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 240 characters

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 240 characters

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 240 characters

columns.Name: EDUCATIONAL_ESTABLISHMENT
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 2000 characters

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 2000 characters

columns.Name: AWARD_TYPE
columns.Comments: A comments field of up to 30 characters

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: A generic date field

columns.Name: DATE_AWARDED
columns.Comments: A generic date field

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: A generic date field

columns.Name: ISSUE_YEAR
columns.Comments: A generic number field

columns.Name: EDUCATIONAL_ESTABLISHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: A generic number field

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: A generic CLOB field

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: A generic CLOB field

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
